title: theArcadia
description: A comprehensive modpack designed to enrich the original game experience
body:
# The Arcadia Project

> ⚠️ **Under active development** — new content is being added regularly.

Arcadia is a vanilla-friendly Minecraft modpack designed to keep the spirit of the
original game intact.

With Arcadia, you get an experience close to vanilla Minecraft: no quests, no
objectives, no restrictions — just pure sandbox freedom.

We hand-pick and integrate mods like Supplementaries, Quark, Amendments, and
Additional Additions to expand gameplay depth and variety, while carefully
preserving Minecraft's original art style and feel.

## What's inside

| Category | Highlights |
|---|---|
| **Vanilla+** | Supplementaries, Quark, Amendments, Spelunkery, Additional Additions — subtle enhancements that blend seamlessly |
| **Living World** | FarmersDelight & Kaleidoscope cooking, Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage, Tinkers' Construct, Storage Drawers, Waystones, Serene Seasons, Touhou Little Maid, CC: Tweaked, and more — 50+ mods for food, furniture, tools, and daily life |
| **Create** | Create 6.0 + 20+ addons including Aeronautics, Big Cannons, Power Grid, Diesel Generators, Copycats+, and Design 'n' Decor |
| **Adventure** | Twilight Forest, The Aether, Alex's Mobs & Caves, Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, Oh The Biomes We've Gone, Biomes O' Plenty, and 18+ new structure packs by YUNG's & Moog's |
| **Tech** | Applied Energistics 2 + 6 addons, Immersive Engineering |
| **Compat** | 8 cross-mod integration bridges ensuring everything works together |

## Advanced client experience

30+ client mods deliver a polished, thoughtful experience — every pixel
and interaction has been tuned.

**UI & typography.** ModernUI replaces the bitmap font with vector
typesetting — crisp at any scale, CJK rendering correct. FrontierUI
remasters every GUI screen with a consistent clean aesthetic. FancyMenu
and Drippy Loading Screen make booting feel intentional, not like a
progress bar from 2011.

**Information, when you need it.** Jade tells you what you're looking at
without popups. EMI surfaces every recipe; JEI ensures no gaps. AppleSkin
shows hunger and saturation inline on food. PickUpNotifier quietly logs
inventory changes. TravelersTitles announces biomes with a subtle
FromSoftware-style banner.

**Character.** Not Enough Animations adds weight to climbing, crawling, and
ladder grabbing. Skin Layers 3D gives depth to hats and armor. Chat
Animation makes multiplayer conversations feel alive.

**Performance you feel.** Sodium + Iris: shader visuals at high FPS on
modest hardware. ModernFix + FerriteCore: fewer GC spikes, smooth chunk
loading. Dynamic lights without the usual tax.

Build with [ShulkerRDK](https://gitlab.com/LiPolymer/ShulkerRDK)
